title: VPIP Drill-Down Modal com Breakdown por Posição e Stack Depth
plan: Analyze existing VPIP stat card in cash_report.py and identify click target
Implement _render_vpip_modal() function with modal overlay, tabs (Por Posição / Por Stack Depth), and close interactions
Wire positional_stats from CashAnalyzer.get_positional_stats() into position tab with table (Position, Hands, VPIP%, PFR, 3-Bet, bb/100) and health badges
Wire stack_depth_data from CashAnalyzer.get_stack_depth_stats() into stack depth tab with table and health badges
Add CSS for modal overlay, modal container, tab buttons, health badges, and vpip-clickable card hover effects
Add JavaScript functions: openVpipModal(), closeVpipModal(), closeVpipModalOverlay(), switchVpipTab(), ESC key listener
Make VPIP stat card clickable with onclick handler and hint text
Integrate modal into generate_cash_report() by passing positional_stats and stack_depth_data
Write comprehensive tests in test_vpip_modal.py covering render structure, tabs, panels, health badges, empty data, JS integration, and full report integration
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build)
